summary: Updated qd report validation so realWorldValidation.status accepts blocked in addition to passed and not_required, normalized the blocked nightly workflow reports to use that status, and recorded positive and negative contract evidence.

acceptanceEvidence.criterion: Read docs/ORCHESTRATION.md and docs/LINUX_ORCHESTRATOR.md before implementation.
acceptanceEvidence.evidence: Both runbooks were read before edits; evidence/m4-qd-realworld-blocked-status-contract/commands.log records validation work for the scoped node.

acceptanceEvidence.criterion: Update qd report validation so realWorldValidation.status accepts exactly passed, not_required, or blocked and rejects unknown values.
acceptanceEvidence.evidence: scripts/qd-report-check/common.sh now allows passed, not_required, or blocked. evidence/m4-qd-realworld-blocked-status-contract/commands.log records blocked accepted by qd-reports-check and unexpected_status rejected by the shared validator.

acceptanceEvidence.criterion: Update the m4-nightly-full-workflow-dispatch completion and audit reports so realWorldValidation.status is blocked instead of not_required.
Record focused positive and negative validation evidence under evidence/m4-qd-realworld-blocked-status-contract/.
acceptanceEvidence.evidence: evidence/m4-qd-realworld-blocked-status-contract/commands.log records nix develop -c just qd-reports-check passing with a blocked report, and records a /tmp unknown-status probe rejected by the validator.

acceptanceEvidence.criterion: Run nix develop -c just check and git diff --check.
acceptanceEvidence.evidence: evidence/m4-qd-realworld-blocked-status-contract/commands.log records nix develop -c just check and git diff --check passing.

commandsRun.command: temporary /tmp unknown realWorldValidation.status probe using validate_real_world_status

realWorldValidation.evidence: Repository qd report metadata validation only; no product runtime behavior is changed or claimed.
